templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at customerservice@veronicabeard.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Dickey and Dickey jacket compatibility
templates.content: All our dickeys and dickey jackets are compatible unless specifically noted in the Details & Fit section on the product page of the item you are viewing. Dickeys come in two sizes, 00-14 and 16-24, and can fit all sizes of corresponding jackets within these ranges. Please note that the Schoolboy and Scuba Hadley Jackets are not outfitted with loops for dickey cuffs.

templates.name: Can I place an order over the phone?
templates.content: Please call customer service for assistance with placing your online order at (888) 686-9558, Monday through Friday, from 10am to 6pm ET.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/veronicabeard/?hl=en and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/VeronicaBeardNY/

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at (888) 686-9558, Monday-Friday 10am-6pm EST, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Do you ship to P.O. Boxes?
templates.content: At this time we are not able to ship to P.O. Box addresses.

templates.name: Do you offer financing?
templates.content: We are pleased to partner with Affirm to offer customers residing in the US fixed monthly installment financing options for your purchase(s) on VeronicaBeard.com. At checkout, choose Pay with Affirm. Follow the prompts on Affirm's external application portal. Affirm asks you for a few pieces of information and performs a credit check when you apply for a loan, this won't impact your credit score. After you provide this information, If approved, Affirm notifies you of the loan amount that you're approved for, the interest rate, and the number of months that you have to pay off your loan. After your purchase, you'll receive monthly email and SMS reminders directly from Affirm about your upcoming payments. For additional information please visit Affirm's website: https://www.affirm.com/help

templates.name: I lost my button. Do you offer replacements?
templates.content: We offer replacements for lost buttons free of charge, based on stock availability, and cannot be guaranteed. Please note that replacements for lost buttons can only be provided for items purchased directly from veronicabeard.com or Veronica Beard store locations. Please email customerservice@veronicabeard.com a picture capturing the overall style of the garment, a picture detailing the button you need, as well as a picture of the interior care tags. We will forward your pictures to our production team to advise on the availability of buttons.

templates.name: Do you offer expedited shipping?
templates.content: We offer UPS 2-Day and Overnight shipping. We ask that customers place their order by noon ET, Monday through Friday, to guarantee 2-Day and Overnight delivery for in-stock items. Orders placed after noon ET will ship the next business day, which may affect the ultimate delivery date.

templates.name: How do I care for/wash my items?
templates.content: Happy to help! Each garment will have a care tag that references specific care instructions. We recommend following the care instructions precisely, as the printed care instructions have been approved after extensive testing by our production team and manufacturing partners.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://veronicabeard.com/tools/track

templates.name: Do you offer price adjustments?
templates.content: I'm afraid we do not offer price adjustments.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 1 business day for all clothing items and up to 3 business days for shoes.  We usually ship via UPS and once shipped you'll receive an email with the tracking information.

templates.name: Retroactive discount code request
templates.content: I'm afraid once an order has been placed we are not able to retroactively apply a promo code. I apologize for the inconvenience!

templates.name: How do I return a gift?
templates.content: To return a gift that you received from an online order, email customerservice@veronicabeard.com with the PO Number on the packing slip or the original PO Number from your gifter's Order Confirmation email, with the name of the style, color, and quantity of the item(s) you'd like to return. Our Customer Service team will issue a prepaid return label to the gift recipient for the item to be returned for an online gift card.

templates.name: Can I return swimwear?
templates.content: To return swimwear, please email customerservice@veronicabeard.com with images displaying all tags and protective liners intact. Items marked as Final Sale and items that have been worn or are missing tags/protective liners will not be eligible for a return or exchange.

templates.name: I'm missing a snap. Do you offer replacements?
templates.content: For missing snaps, please email customerservice@veronicabeard.com with one picture capturing the overall style of the garment and another picture detailing the snap you need. Items with faulty snaps may be accepted for in-house repairs only-we don't issue snaps as they are often incorrectly affixed by third-party tailors.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can apply for our Affiliate program here: https://veronicabeard.rmaffiliate.com/register

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://veronicabeard.com/pages/returns-exchanges

templates.name: Sizing
templates.content: Happy to help! Would you mind sharing your usual size? I'd also recommend taking a look at the size guide available on each product page.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all orders over $100 within the continental U.S. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: You can start your return here: https://returns.veronicabeard.com/#/

templates.name: Do you ship to military addresses?
templates.content: At this time we are not able to ship to military addresses.

templates.name: Price Matching
templates.content: I'm afraid we do not price match other retailers.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@veronicabeard.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us near you here: https://veronicabeard.com/pages/our-stores#!

templates.name: How long does it take to process my return?
templates.content: Please note that it takes up to 10 business days for returns to be processed and checked back into our warehouse. Once your return is processed, you'll receive an automated email notification that a refund has been issued back to your original method of payment.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out!

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Unfortunately, we are unable to make additions, changes, or cancellations to an order once it has been placed. In this case, we kindly ask that you return your original merchandise and place a new order. You will receive a refund for the returned merchandise as soon as it is processed, pending its eligibility.

templates.name: Can I buy online and pick up at a store?
templates.content: Veronica Beard offers you the option to buy online and pickup in-store, with no shipping fee incurred. Most orders are ready in 4 hours or less! If the items in your shopping cart are available for pickup in-store, you will see in-store pickup as a shipping option at checkout. Please note that in-store pickup is currently available at limited Veronica Beard store locations at this time.
